claims.summary: A 0.85 high-texture entropy gate can over-expand continuity recap at entropy around 0.90, making rich viscous containment feel too clinical or complex.
Shadow-v3 dispersal may be stabilized too aggressively during Witness and friction; monitor the shadow dispersal/volatility path with sandbox or replay evidence before changing live control.
Adding a live shadow_volatility_buffer or changing shadow stabilization/control behavior would affect live substrate-facing state and requires Mike/operator approval.
